title: Empower Chromatography Data System (CDS)
note: Product page describing Empower CDS data acquisition, management, processing, reporting, audit, scalability, and instrument-control capabilities.

title: Waters Market Cap

note: Market-data summary used as a rough cross-check for trailing net income and valuation inputs.

title: OpenChrom/openchrom
note: Public repository for OpenChrom, including source availability, license, and project description.

title: OpenChrom by Lablicate
note: Project site describing OpenChrom as vendor-independent open-source software for chromatography, spectrometry, and spectroscopy analysis.

title: Opentrons Flex Open-Source Software
note: Documentation showing open-source lab automation software and public GitHub resources relevant to modular lab workflow decentralization.

title: PyLabRobot/pylabrobot
note: Public repository for a hardware-agnostic open-source lab automation SDK.

title: PyLabRobot: An Open-Source, Hardware Agnostic Interface for Liquid-Handling Robots and Accessories
note: Peer-reviewed open-access paper documenting PyLabRobot and the case for open, hardware-agnostic laboratory automation interfaces.

title: Open-Source Syringe Pump
publisher: Mass Spectrometry Research Group, Moscow State University
note: Open-source analytical-laboratory syringe pump project used as evidence for component-level open lab hardware feasibility.
